professions.title: Chief Information Officer
professions.description: The CIO leads the strategic vision for all information systems across an organisation. In the llamaverse, CIOs are held to exceptionally high standards given that data is treated as a sovereign resource. Most senior CIOs hold postgraduate qualifications from the Llamaverse Institute of Technology and have demonstrable expertise in multi-model database architecture.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Seer of Stars — allows anticipation of architectural bottlenecks before they manifest
